_comment: TEMPLATE FILE: Copy this to data/company.json and fill in real values. data/company.json is gitignored.
name: Open Innova S.r.l.
description: We help Italian companies adopt open innovation methodologies, combining software products with strategic consulting and coaching.

founders.name: Mario Rossi
founders.bio: Mario brings 15+ years of experience in innovation management and digital transformation. He leads Open Innova's strategic vision.

founders.name: Lucia Bianchi
founders.bio: Lucia is a software architect specializing in innovation platforms. She oversees all technical projects at Open Innova.

team.name: Marco Verdi
team.bio: Marco designs and delivers open innovation transformation programs.

products.name: Innovate Suite
products.description: Enterprise platform for managing open innovation processes: idea collection, collaboration with external partners, innovation portfolio management.

products.name: Collab Hub
products.description: Secure platform for coordinating with startups, universities, and innovation partners.

services.name: Innovation Consulting
services.description: Strategic consulting to help organizations adopt open innovation models.

services.name: Executive Coaching
services.description: One-on-one coaching for innovation leaders and entrepreneurs.

services.name: Innovation Training
services.description: Workshops and seminars on open innovation frameworks and best practices.

openInnovation.mission: We believe in the power of permeable boundaries. By combining internal expertise with external innovation, we help companies accelerate their digital transformation and market success.
openInnovation.approach: Our methodology is based on Henry Chesbrough's Open Innovation model: systematic integration of external ideas and paths to market.

copyright: © 2026 Open Innova S.r.l. All rights reserved.
